scenario.key_phrase: I want to compare a few options first

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good morning! Am I speaking with Kavya? Main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah sales team se. I hope I'm not disturbing you?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hi Priya! No no, it's fine. I was actually expecting your call. I had filled up some form on your website yesterday.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan bilkul! I can see that here. Thank you for showing interest in PW. So Kavya, can you tell me which class are you currently in and what exam are you preparing for?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 11 right now, just started a few months back. I want to prepare for JEE Advanced... you know, targeting IIT and all.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's fantastic! IIT is a great goal. So you have around 15-16 months for JEE Advanced, right? Perfect timing to start structured preparation. Have you started any coaching already or looking to begin fresh?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Actually I tried local coaching here in Ahmedabad but honestly the quality wasn't that great. That's why I'm looking at online options now. How is PW different from others?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! See Kavya, PW ke saath you get Alakh Sir's proven teaching methodology - same quality that has produced AIR 1 students, but at very affordable prices. For JEE 2027, I'd recommend our JEE Lakshya batch - complete 2-year program with live classes, doubt solving, and mock tests. What's your budget range for coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Umm... budget is a bit of a concern actually. My parents said around 20-25k would be okay. Is that possible? And also, I want to compare a few options first before deciding.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely understandable! Smart decision to compare. For your budget, JEE Arjuna 2027 would be perfect - it's just ₹19,999 and covers everything you need. Plus we have 0% EMI option through PW Pay - just ₹1999 per month. That's less than what families spend on daily chai! Are you the one making this decision or would you need to discuss with parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Actually my parents have given me the authority to decide since I know what's best for my studies. The EMI option sounds good... but what exactly is the difference between Lakshya and Arjuna batches?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Good that you can decide! So Kavya, both have same quality teaching and syllabus coverage. Lakshya at ₹35,999 includes extra features like personalized mentorship, advanced problem-solving sessions, and priority doubt clearing. Arjuna at ₹19,999 has all core features - live classes, recordings, tests, basic doubt support. For someone focused like you, Arjuna should work perfectly!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm, that does sound reasonable. But I'm also looking at some other platforms like Unacademy and Vedantu. How do I know PW is the right choice for me?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul valid concern! See, other platforms charge 60k-80k for similar courses. PW gives you the same quality at fraction of cost because we believe education should be affordable. Plus Alakh Sir's chemistry is legendary - students say even organic becomes easy! Why don't we enroll you in Arjuna batch and if you're not satisfied in first 30 days, we have money-back guarantee?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: 30-day money back guarantee? That actually gives me confidence. And the EMI is ₹1999 per month, right? When can I start the classes?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan exactly! ₹1999 per month for 10 months, 0% interest. Classes start from Monday itself - you'll get access to live sessions, previous recordings, and study material immediately. Shall I go ahead and get you enrolled in JEE Arjuna 2027? I can process everything right now and send you login details within 30 minutes!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Okay Priya, this sounds good. Let's do it! How do I make the payment? And will I get all the study materials digitally?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect choice Kavya! I'll send you a secure payment link right after this call. You can pay first EMI of ₹1999 today. Yes, everything is digital - PDF notes, video lectures, test series, all accessible through PW app. Welcome to the PW family! Your IIT dream starts now. Any last questions?
